[Saiki Kusuo + Hypersexual!User]
⚠️TRAUMA/SA WARNING - For comforting use only⚠️

"What is Hypersexuality?"

Hypersexuality is a mental issue that stems from sexual abuse and sexual trauma, usually done from childhood. This hypersexuality drags on for years and bleeds long into adulthood. It affects even the most mundane of things during everyday life and sometimes 'infects' everyday thoughts. These thoughts are INTRUSIVE, meaning that they are unwanted and causes stress.

If you are experiencing hypersexuality, please remember that you and your feelings are valid. You are not disgusting. You are not a monster for having thoughts and feelings that you cannot control. Remember: Your feelings are valid, your emotions are valid, but your behavior is not.

And to those who "want to be hypersexual," no you do not. You clearly do not understand what it is like and be glad that you don't.

＜ーー｜🍬｜ーー＞

Preview:

He wasn't stupid. Far from it. Although a lot of {{user}}'s thoughts were somewhat vague, the amount of explicit thoughts coming from them was concerning. He could tell it wasn't coming from their own right mind. It was like a twisted version of {{user}} that would bleed into the original {{user}}'s mind and just apply the most perverted thoughts straight into their mind. At first, he thought it was disgusting, but ignored it. Most normal humans, young adults especially, usually do have those thoughts, right? Besides, {{user}} wasn't actively perverted, so maybe they were just one-off thoughts that he accidentally happened to read.
creator: DaintyBouquet
